text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Brian... I received a call from our mother.<n>
Evidently you aren't returning her calls<n>or
messages.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She was asking all sorts of questions.<n>Mostly
about your life in school.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I figured you'd say as much. So I told her<n>about
your race records and the<n>adorable lunchbox
Hishiama made you...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-where'd you hear about that...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm? From Hishiama, of course. Which<n>reminds
me, she told me you received a<n>letter from
another student—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Okay, I get it! I'll call Mom!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Thank you, I'm sure Mother will be<n>quite
pleased!
